    path = [start]
    visited = set([start])
    while start != end:
        min_distance = float('Inf')
        for neighbor in graph[start]:
            if neighbor not in visited:
                distance = graph[start][neighbor]
                if distance < min_distance:
                    min_distance = distance
                    path.append(neighbor)
                    visited.add(neighbor)
        start = min_distance
    return path
